title: azarolus crataegoides var. piriformis
intro: Azarolus crataegoides var. piriformis, also known as the Pyramidal Haw or Wild Pear, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the family Rosaceae. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of amygdalin, a glycoside that has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Azarolus crataegoides var. piriformis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. This plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine and folk remedies.
